facebook-scrape.summary: Run at 11:06 AM ET Apr 2 (15:06 UTC). Facebook account SUSPENDED — appeal submitted April 2, 2026. Screen reads: 'Your account is not visible to people on Facebook, and you can't use it.' Account is under review by Facebook. No data collection possible. All cumulative totals unchanged: 18 groups, 116 comments, 39 positive, 4 DMs, 13 interest signals. No Notion leads logged. Action required: Vito must resolve the Facebook account appeal before scraper can resume.

linkedin-scrape.summary: Scraped LinkedIn (4:39 AM ET Apr 2): Metrics stable. 210 pending sent requests, most recent batch sent ~19 hours ago (Francisco Garcia, Brendan McGeer, Colin Hoffman + others on Apr 1). Total connections: 1,046. This week: 9 new connections — 8 on Apr 1 (David Sloan, John Barron, Michael Welch, Abraham Palacios, Kyle O'Connor, Kelly Kenter, Jennifer Porcello, Carlos Amaya) + 1 on Mar 31 (Stefano Cardillo). No unread messages. 0 interest signals — only inbound is Vincent Handugan (VA pitch, not a buyer). requestsSent: 210, totalConnections: 1046, replies: 1, interestSignals: 0.
